title: dashboard.overview.gpu.task.detail
description: Per-task detail from /hami/api/vgpu/v1/container?name=&podUid=&sharemode=. HAMI returns the detail object FLAT at the top level (no `data` envelope). `items[0].raw` / `items[0].display` mirror the upstream document one-to-one — fields include name, status, podUid, nodeName, deviceShareModes[], devicesCoreUtilizedPercent[], devicesMemUtilized[], allocatedDevices, deviceIds[], createTime, startTime, endTime, namespace, resourcePool, flavor, priority, appName. Soft-gated like gpu.list (admin / CUDA hints land in meta.note). Empty envelopes carry 'no_vgpu_integration' (HAMI 404), 'vgpu_unavailable' (HAMI 5xx — meta.error / meta.http_status), or 'no_gpu_detected' (HAMI 200 but empty body).
